vulnerablePopulations: patients without access to EMG and multidisciplinary care
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical UMN/LMN signs with progression; EMG supportive; exclude mimics

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Not curable; outcomes depend on access to respiratory/nutritional support

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Diagnosis concentrated in tertiary neurology centers; EMG access limited outside cities
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Riluzole where available, NIV, nutrition support, physiotherapy, and palliative care
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited multidisciplinary ALS services and high out-of-pocket costs for respiratory support
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing tertiary neurology capacity in major cities
